narrativeProgression.summary: A witness account conflicts with dispatch timing by exactly nine minutes.
narrativeProgression.beatNarrative: At 11:47 p.m., a voicemail from unit 331 predicts your next text message word for word.

threadUpdates.update: Unit 331 pings alive: At 11:47 p.m., a voicemail from unit 331 predicts your next text message word for word.
Peripheral signal tied to Freight elevator camera still remains unresolved.
Minor anomaly logged but not yet actionable.
No new movement on false lead this cycle.
Subtle repetition appears in unrelated communications.

evidenceDrops.title: Midnight Lockbox - Day 03 journal entry
evidenceDrops.summary: Artifact advances verified evidence chain and supports deduction around Freight elevator camera still.

imagePrompt.style: hyper-realistic forensic horror, analog imperfection, grounded true-crime framing
imagePrompt.prompt: Midnight Lockbox ARG artifact Day 03. Type: journal_entry. Clue focus: Freight elevator camera still. Location: Gallowglass 24-hour storage facility and storm-drain service tunnels. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Camera: Canon EOS R6, 35mm prime, ISO 3200, f/1.8, 1/40 shutter. Visual defects: sensor noise, halation bloom, slight motion blur, fingerprint smudge, timestamp burn-in. Lighting: practical sodium-vapor spill with deep shadow falloff, imperfect white balance. Composition: evidence-forward framing, handwritten marks, believable wear, no cinematic polish. No intentional misdirection.
imagePrompt.negativePrompt: clean CGI, fantasy look, glossy studio lighting, over-sharpened edges, watermark, logo, gore fetish, cartoon style

audioPrompt.style: psychological dread, industrial ambience, noisy field recording authenticity
audioPrompt.prompt: Midnight Lockbox journal_entry audio cue for day 3. Clue anchor: Freight elevator camera still. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Texture: low drone bed, distant metallic resonance, intermittent room-tone dropouts. Include one decipherable spoken fragment and one environmental clue (HVAC hum, rail click, siren bleed, pager chirp). Add mild tape flutter, codec smear, clipped transients, and uneven dynamic floor to keep it grounded.

interactions.messageTemplate: {{player_alias}}, before you move: chain-of-custody on today's drop is unstable. Confirm Freight elevator camera still and tell me if your last call still stands (decision.day_02.primary).
I heard my own words on a line I never called. If you still trust {{trusted_contact}}, do not forward this to the wrong desk.
Off-record: I can publish tonight, but your previous choice is already circulating. I need one verification point tied to Freight elevator camera still.
I watched your response window close. If you still want the living truth, compare day 03 to today before sunrise.

awarenessMoments.trigger: if decision.log contains any entry for previous day
awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: You repeated yesterday's pattern ({{last_major_choice}}). People who survive this case learn faster.

adaptiveLines: Reference previous choice without breaking realism.
Acknowledge response latency as if monitored by live actors.
Escalate or soften tone based on trust flags and solved puzzles.
